definition.name: noisy_overlap_matrix
definition.definition: The modified noisy overlap matrix: [G̃(q,N)]_{π,σ} = ⟨⟨π|N^{⊗2}|σ⟩⟩, where N is a noise channel. For single-qudit depolarizing N(ρ)=(1-γ)ρ+γ1/d, this becomes G̃(d,N) = ((d^2, d), (d, 1+(d^2-1)(1-γ)^2)). [Ref: Eq.(5) of Sauliere2026, line 158]
